ddls:
CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the release */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the release, including special editions and misprints */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Format of the release (foreign key) */,
  "cat_number" TEXT /* Catalog number of the release */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year of the release */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country of the release (foreign key) */,
  "special_code" TEXT /* Special code or identifier for the release */,
  "release_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of release (foreign key) */,
  "distributed_by" TEXT /* Distributor of the release */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the release was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the release was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_release_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_type_id") REFERENCES release_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the artist */,
  "artist_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "artist_image" TEXT /* Image of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases_artists" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist associated with the release */,
  "artist_role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the release (e.g., main artist, featured artist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g., CD, vinyl, digital) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the release type (e.g., promo, commercial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the release type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the note is associated with */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., general, technical) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_notes_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the track belongs to */,
  "track_title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "track_length" TEXT /* Length of the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number in the release */,
  "is_bonus" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track is a bonus track */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distribution_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the distribution channel (e.g., physical stores, online) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the distribution channel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases_distribution" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distribution channel */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date the release was distributed through the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id", "channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., artist, producer, distributor, marketer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the release */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the release was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version (e.g., misprint, special edition) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_code" TEXT /* Special code or identifier for the version */,
  "is_special_edition" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is a special edition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_versions_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotional_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional material */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the material is associated with */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotional material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of promotional material (e.g., image, video) */,
  "material_file" TEXT /* File associated with the promotional material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotional_materials_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the collaborator is involved in */,
  "collaborator_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator in the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_regions" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date the release was distributed in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id", "region_id")
)
